reviewText:
Had such a wonderful experience at Curious Tails! From the moment I stepped in, Kim and Nelson were incredibly warm, patient, and genuinely passionate about what they do. They took the time to walk me through everything and made sure I felt confident and informed every step of the way.

The puppies were well taken care of — clean, active, and clearly loved. I really appreciated the transparency with health checks and all the details provided, which gave me a lot of peace of mind.

What stood out the most was the aftercare support — you can tell they truly care about both the pets and the owners, not just making a sale.

I got my furkid from them on the very day in 2025, and she has brought so much joy into my life. I’m really glad I chose Curious Tails.

Highly recommend Curious Tails to anyone looking for a trustworthy and caring pet shop. 🐶💖
replyText: Thank you so much, Jenn! 🐶💖 We're absolutely thrilled that your furkid has brought so much joy into your life, and it was a pleasure having Kim and Nelson help you find your perfect match — your trust means everything to us, and we're here for you every step of the journey ahead!

reviewText:
I had an absolutely wonderful experience with this pet shop and highly recommend them to anyone looking to welcome a new puppy into their home.

From the start, their pricing was very reasonable and transparent, which gave me confidence right away. What truly impressed me was their level of service—they even arranged for the puppy to be delivered directly to my home at no extra charge, which made the whole process so convenient and stress-free.

They went above and beyond by helping to handle the licence transfer and patiently guiding me through the pet ownership course requirements. As a new owner, this kind of support made a huge difference and gave me peace of mind.

On top of that, they provided a generous starter kit that included a full set of food and essential accessories for my puppy—everything I needed to get started immediately. They also covered the full vaccination, which shows how much they genuinely care about the well-being of their animals.

Overall, their professionalism, care, and dedication really stood out. You can tell they are not just selling pets—they truly want both the puppy and the owner to have the best possible start together.
replyText: Thank you so much, Ash! 🐾 We're thrilled to hear that your journey with us was smooth and meaningful—it's wonderful to know that our support through the delivery, licensing, and course guidance made such a positive difference as you welcomed your new family member home. We truly believe puppies and their owners deserve the best possible start together, and your kind words mean the world to us!

replyText: Thank you so much, Jared! We're thrilled you felt so well taken care of and that our team could share their knowledge and reassure you every step of the way.

reviewText:
As first time dog owners, our family really appreciated how Nelson & Kim provided us with so much assurance and support throughout the whole process. They were knowledgeable and considerate and talked us through what we should expect.

Our puppy is the perfect, joyful addition to our family. His exceptional health and bright temperament are a testament to the high standards of Curious Tails.

Once we made our decision on our dear little Archie, Nelson assisted with the drop- off and even provided a short training at our house.
The entire starter pack is so helpful for first time dog owners as it contains every single item that one would require.
Excited to spend time with our new family member - Archie!!
replyText: Dear Rekha, thank you so much for trusting us with your family's first puppy journey! We're thrilled that Archie has settled in so beautifully and that Nelson's home training visit gave you extra confidence. Give that precious boy a big cuddle from all of us at Curious Tails!
Thank you so much for the 5-star rating, MKS Arul! We’re thrilled you’re happy with your experience—come visit us again anytime.

reviewText: Hi, thank you very much for the excellent service !! and clear explanation throughout the process. The transaction was smooth and well handled he has reached home safely and is settling in well. We really appreciate your support.
replyText: Thank you Sharmini for your kind words! We're so glad your puppy arrived safely and is settling in well with

reviewText: They were extremely patient and kind when it came to answering all the questions!
replyText: Thank you so much, Suva! We're thrilled you felt heard and supported—your questions matter to us, and it's our joy to help.

reviewText: Curious Tails has been nothing short of outstanding. Nelson and his wife are professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely passionate about giving every puppy the best start. The puppies are well-socialized, healthy, and lovingly cared for in a clean and nurturing environment. Communication is smooth, and they patiently address every question with clarity and sincerity. If you’re looking for a trustworthy and responsible breeder, Curious Tails is highly recommended!
replyText: Thank you so much, LKH Lim, for your kind and thoughtful review! We're truly touched that you've seen our dedication to giving every puppy the best start in life.

reviewText: Nelson and Kim were really friendly and knowledgeable about the dogs under their care. They take really good care of them and we were so happy to bring home our Corgi who’s such a joy to have. Thanks again! Highly recommended!
replyText: Thank you so much, Gs Lee! We're thrilled that Nelson and Kim could help you find the perfect Corgi, and it means the world to us that you noticed how much we care for all our pups. Wishing you and your joyful new family member many wonderful adventures together!

reviewText: Curious tails is the best place to buy a smart and beautiful puppy! Specially thank you very much Kimberly at Balestier road, all puppies are amazing, very well taken care of and trained.
replyText: Thank you so much, Maria! We’re thrilled you had a wonderful experience with Kimberly at our Balestier shop—she truly cares for every puppy’s well-being and training.

reviewText:
Was looking around and not really decided to get a puppy yet. We went down to Curious Tails to have a look and also to check out on stuff. Nelson and Kim really give us  an idea what we are going to expect and answer our questions. They also have great after sales where they are still answering and giving us advise. The puppy is healthy, very smart, and very to have great to have around the house.

I would highly recommend them if anyone is getting a puppy or planning to have one! Thank you Nelson and Kim!
replyText: Dear Maxwell, thank you for taking the time to share your experience! We're so glad Nelson and Kim could help you feel prepared, and it means the world to us that you're happy with your healthy, smart new family member.

reviewText: Useless operating time.
replyText: Thank you for your feedback, Hyeok Ethan Gwon. We're sorry our operating hours didn't work for you, and we'll take this into consideration to better serve our customers.

reviewText: I had a wonderful experience getting my corgi from this pet shop! The owners were kind, knowledgeable, and truly cared about the well-being of their puppies. They answered all my questions patiently and made sure I was fully prepared before bringing my corgi home. My pup is healthy, happy, and everything I hoped for. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a furry companion!
replyText: Thank you so much, Pearlyn! We're truly touched by your kind words and so happy that your corgi is thriving with you. It was our pleasure helping you prepare for your new family member.
